twitter_thread: Saved 240 hours with Canva Pro, but its Magic Studio AI failed 40% of the time.
Canva Pro's AI is limited to designs with 5 elements or less. Beyond that, use Figma's more advanced tools.
Background remover works 80% of the time, but struggles with intricate images like hairstyles or trees.
A well-set brand kit in Canva Pro reduces design time by 30%. Set it up in 10 minutes with 3 core elements.
Only 12 of Canva Pro's 1000+ templates are suitable for corporate design. Use the 'trending' filter to find them.
Canva Pro's default fonts are limited to 14 options. Use Google Fonts to access 1000+ alternatives.
What's your experience with Canva Pro? Does it replace a dedicated designer? #designproductivity #canvapro
